content:
I need to multiply 333 × 246 in base 11.

Let me convert to base 10 first, multiply, then convert back to base 11.

333₁₁ to base 10:
3×11² + 3×11¹ + 3×11⁰ = 3×121 + 3×11 + 3×1 = 363 + 33 + 3 = 399₁₀

246₁₁ to base 10:
2×11² + 4×11¹ + 6×11⁰ = 2×121 + 4×11 + 6×1 = 242 + 44 + 6 = 292₁₀

Multiply in base 10:
399 × 292 = 116,508₁₀

Convert 116,508₁₀ to base 11:
116,508 ÷ 11 = 10,591 remainder 7
10,591 ÷ 11 = 962 remainder 9
962 ÷ 11 = 87 remainder 5
87 ÷ 11 = 7 remainder 10 (which is A in base 11)
7 ÷ 11 = 0 remainder 7

Reading the remainders from bottom to top: 7A597₁₁

Let me verify: 7×11⁴ + 10×11³ + 5×11² + 9×11¹ + 7×11⁰
= 7×14,641 + 10×1,331 + 5×121 + 9×11 + 7
= 102,487 + 13,310 + 605 + 99 + 7
= 116,508 ✓

7A597
